case_title: NANETTE OSORO VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORO, NANETTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2025 BY GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF NANETTE OSORO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NOE BROOKS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORO, NANETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSORO, NANETTE AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED DEC-19-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.
